_comment: Curated Trackblazer race agendas. Selecting one populates the smart race solver's target_epithets so it schedules (and keeps) the races needed to complete them, instead of minimising races for fans alone. Epithet names must match data/trackblazer/epithets.json. These are SOFT targets (no MILP-infeasibility risk); use trackblazer_forced_epithets for hard commitments. The 'balanced' set mirrors the epithets the Android smart solver actually earned on an Oguri Cap run (39 races, ~826k fans).

agendas.title: Balanced (Fans + Epithets)
agendas.description: Broad achievable epithet set across turf/dirt G1s, regions, and distances. Mirrors the Android solver's proven 39-race, ~826k-fan Oguri run. Best general-purpose choice.

agendas.title: Mile Specialist
agendas.description: Mile/standard-distance focused. Good for mile-aptitude trainees (e.g. Oguri Cap S-mile).

agendas.title: Dirt Crusher
agendas.description: Dirt G1 chain plus dirt-themed epithets. Requires solid dirt aptitude.

agendas.title: Globe-Trotter (Regional Spread)
agendas.description: Maximises race variety across Japan's regions for regional epithets. Highest raw race count.
